files.patch:
@@ -13,10 +13,10 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v3
         with:
-          version: 8
+          version: 10.20.0
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 20
+          node-version: 22
           cache: 'pnpm'
       - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
       - run: pnpm check
